steps.name: cross-surface-visual-qa

steps.name: application-button-groups-hero-level-rework
steps.summary: Completed the Application UI Elements hero-level pass with Button Groups. Re-captured Tailwind desktop and 390px mobile reference, replaced the shared generic element-button-group-page preview with 5 dedicated variants for basic segments, dark icon-only, stat, dark dropdown, and checkbox/dropdown treatments, documented that no imagegen asset is needed because the reference is UI/control-only, and confirmed 5/5 names, no preview images, two dark panels, stat/dropdown/checkbox markers, and no desktop or 390px mobile page overflow in smoke.

steps.name: application-containers-hero-level-rework
steps.summary: Started the Application UI Layout hero-level pass with Containers. Re-captured Tailwind desktop and 390px mobile reference, replaced the shared generic layout-container-page content-card preview with 5 dedicated container diagram variants using pink gutters, dashed/hatched content areas, one dark breakpoint treatment, and a narrow constrained-width treatment. No imagegen asset was needed because the reference is layout diagram-only; smoke confirmed 5/5 names, no preview images, four pink panels, one dark panel, five hatched diagrams, and no desktop or 390px mobile page overflow.

steps.name: application-cards-hero-level-rework
steps.summary: Continued the Application UI Layout hero-level pass with Cards. Re-captured Tailwind desktop and 390px mobile reference, replaced the shared generic layout-panel-page two-panel preview with 10 dedicated card/well surface variants for basic, edge-to-edge, header, footer, header/footer, gray footer, gray body, dark well, gray well, and edge-to-edge well treatments. No imagegen asset was needed because the reference is UI/card surface-only; smoke confirmed 10/10 names, no preview images, dark/gray/hatched surface markers, and no desktop or 390px mobile page overflow.

steps.name: application-list-containers-hero-level-rework
steps.summary: Continued the Application UI Layout hero-level pass with List containers. Re-captured Tailwind desktop and 390px mobile reference, replaced the shared text-heavy list/activity preview with 7 dedicated skeleton list container variants for simple dividers, dark card dividers, mobile-full card dividers, separate cards, mobile-full separate cards, flat card dividers, and dark simple dividers. No imagegen asset was needed because the reference is layout skeleton-only; smoke confirmed 7/7 names, no preview images, skeleton rows, dark/gray/card/separate markers, and no desktop or 390px mobile page overflow. Documented that future image-backed previews require fresh purpose-fit assets rather than reused generic images.

steps.name: application-media-objects-hero-level-rework
steps.summary: Continued the Application UI Layout hero-level pass with Media Objects. Re-captured Tailwind desktop and 390px mobile reference, replaced the shared element-avatar preview with 8 dedicated media object variants for basic, center-aligned dark, bottom-aligned, stretched, right-media dark, basic responsive, wide responsive, and nested dark layouts. No imagegen asset was needed because the reference uses CSS/layout placeholders only; smoke confirmed 8/8 names, no preview images, three dark panels, media placeholder markers, and no desktop or 390px mobile page overflow.

steps.name: application-dividers-hero-level-rework
steps.summary: Completed the Application UI Layout hero-level pass with Dividers. Re-captured Tailwind desktop and 390px mobile reference, replaced the shared layout-divider split-panel preview with 8 dedicated divider variants for label, icon, left label, title, left title, button, dark title-and-button, and toolbar treatments. No imagegen asset was needed because the reference is UI/control-only; smoke confirmed 8/8 names, no preview images, two dark panels, button/title/toolbar markers, and no desktop or 390px mobile page overflow.

steps.name: application-home-screens-hero-level-rework
steps.summary: Started the Application UI Page Examples hero-level pass with Home Screens. Re-captured Tailwind desktop and 390px mobile reference, replaced the shared app-example-dashboard shell with 2 dedicated page-scale home screens: a dark deployment dashboard with sidebar/list/activity-feed structure and a light stacked cashflow dashboard with KPI strip, recent activity table, and client cards. No imagegen asset was needed because the reference is UI/table/card-only; smoke confirmed 2/2 names, no preview images, dashboard markers, and no desktop or 390px mobile page overflow.

steps.name: application-detail-screens-hero-level-rework
steps.summary: Continued the Application UI Page Examples hero-level pass with Detail Screens. Re-captured Tailwind desktop and 390px mobile reference, replaced the shared app-example-detail shell with 2 dedicated page-scale detail screens: a dark deployment detail screen with tabs, KPI metrics, and latest activity, plus a light invoice detail screen with invoice metadata, project rows, amount card, and activity/comment panel. No imagegen asset was needed because the reference is UI/table/card-only; smoke confirmed 2/2 names, no preview images, detail markers, and no desktop or 390px mobile page overflow.

steps.name: application-settings-screens-hero-level-rework
steps.summary: Completed the Application UI Page Examples hero-level pass with Settings Screens. Re-captured Tailwind desktop and 390px mobile reference, replaced the shared app-example-settings shell with 2 dedicated page-scale settings screens: a dark account settings form with tabs, avatar control, form fields, and save action, plus a light stacked settings page with profile, bank account, integration, language/date rows, update actions, and toggle treatment. No imagegen asset was needed because the reference is UI/form/list-only; smoke confirmed 2/2 names, no preview images, settings markers, and no desktop or 390px mobile page overflow.
